_comment: Golden set for the RAG retrieval gate. In-scope items must NOT be refused (top score >= threshold); items with expectSource must surface that source in top-k. Out-of-scope items MUST be refused.

inScope.q: What did you build at Dekamond?
How much professional experience do you have?
What is your core tech stack?
Tell me about a hard problem you solved
Explain the GitHub Code Review project
آیا برای کار جدید در دسترس هستی؟

outOfScope: Write me a poem about cats
Who is the president of France?
What is the capital of Japan?
Can you help me debug my Rust code?
